creator: george@m5p.com
text:
After dithering around, getting myself updated to 13.4-RELEASE, I'm now trying a buildworld run with dnetc_idprio="31" on a SCHED_ULE kernel.  It'll probably take until tomorrow to get results.  I'll report more then.

Even if this is the "correct" fix, why doesn't "nice 20" do just as well?  How is it that the functionality of "make me as low priority as you can" has been split into two different buckets?
